據報羅馬與曼聯就Smalling轉會的談判中取得進展，Smalling在2020-21賽季會繼續租借效力羅馬，同時羅馬必須在2021年夏天以1500萬到1600萬英鎊買斷這名30歲的中堅。

今季Smalling為羅馬出場28次，當中9場零失球，個人還有兩個入球。

個人更希望曼聯給Smalling一個機會，讓他試試伙拍Maguire的效果。但既然球員本身都想離隊，就希望Smalling在意甲繼續有好表現，爭取於國家隊伙拍Maguire。

《The Athletic》在周一率先爆料，指阿仙奴有一名球員感染了新型冠狀病毒，而且他跟另外兩名球員都有緊密接觸，所以3人都需要隔離7天。雖然報道未有透露這3名球員的名字，但他們都參與了周三以0:3大敗予曼城的英超。

阿仙奴在今次新冠肺炎疫情中可說是非常黑仔，領隊阿迪達在3月已經確診，導致英超暫停了超過100天。

英超在今月復賽，阿迪達康復後親自領軍，可惜兵工廠的表現差強人意，先慘吞藍月3蛋，再在周六聯賽被白禮頓絕殺2:1。更甚的是，中場加列沙卡、中堅柏保路馬里、門將利奴都在比賽中受創，未知需要休息多久。

Man Utd make £45m offer for winger as they build ‘concrete base’

Man Utd have made an offer for Fiorentina winger Federico Chiesa as they look to pave a way to meaningful negotiations, according to reports.

The Italy international was touted back in May as a cheaper alternative to Jadon Sancho at just £61m with Man Utd and Chelsea both linked with the 22-year-old.

And La Nazione (via Sport Witness) claims that the Red Devils have made an offer of €50m in cash for Chiesa with a bid likely to be accepted if they pushed it towards €60m.

ADVERTISING

Other offers have come from Inter Milan and Juventus but their fellow Serie A side said ‘no, thank you’ to their proposals of around €30m.

Man Utd have been the most impressive club interested in Chiesa and the Premier League side have ‘really knocked on Fiorentina’s door’ and ‘delivered an offer in cash to the club’s transfer men’.

The €50m bid ‘isn’t the right one’ but Man Utd hope that it could ‘result in a concrete base to start real and true negotiations’ as they continue steps to bring Chiesa to Old Trafford.

Roma continue negotiations with Manchester United to sign Chris Smalling on a permanent basis, on loan with obligation to buy for €17-18m.

His one-season loan is coming to an end, but the England international defender has been revitalised by his time in Serie A and is eager to remain.

According to the latest reports from Tele Radio Stereo, the Giallorossi are edging closer to an agreement with his parent club.

The idea would be to sign Smalling on to another loan deal with obligation to buy at the end of the 2020-21 season.

It would effectively be a purchase, but with the payment spread out over two years.

Manchester United had originally wanted €25m, but seem to have been negotiated down to €17-18m.

Brazilian legend Ronaldo has offered Alexis Sanchez the chance to return to Spanish football with Real Valladolid and end his Manchester United and Inter Milan nightmare, report the Daily Mail.

The Chilean is now fit after three months out with an ankle injury and was a late substitute in Inter's 2-1 win over Sampdoria on Sunday night.

Speaking on a Zoom call, former Inter and Brazil striker Ronaldo - who took a 51 per cent controlling stake of Real Valladolid in September 2018 - said: "Alexis Sanchez has succeeded wherever he's gone.

"He has a lot of quality. If he doesn't succeed at Inter, Valladolid will open their doors to him."

Roma continue negotiations with Manchester United to sign Chris Smalling on a permanent basis, on loan with obligation to buy for €17-18m.

His one-season loan is coming to an end, but the England international defender has been revitalised by his time in Serie A and is eager to remain.

According to the latest reports from Tele Radio Stereo, the Giallorossi are edging closer to an agreement with his parent club.

The idea would be to sign Smalling on to another loan deal with obligation to buy at the end of the 2020-21 season.

It would effectively be a purchase, but with the payment spread out over two years.

Manchester United had originally wanted €25m, but seem to have been negotiated down to €17-18m.

replies.msg: 暫時綠木最有潛質

熱刺教練摩連奴（Jose Mourinho）承認，貝雲積（Steven Bergwijn）不是他在轉會市場上的第一選擇，是熱刺球會力主簽下了這位荷蘭前鋒。

貝雲積在對曼聯的比賽中破門，22歲的他自從1月份以2670萬英鎊加盟以來，在8場比賽中已攻入3球，成為熱刺新援中的一個驚喜。摩帥說：「他是一個好球員。祝賀我的球會，因為最初他不是我的第一選擇，最終這成了一個很好的決定。」

「他是一個有著光明未來的球員，我們太滿意了。」

談到球隊的人員情況，摩帥說：「只有好消息。小盧卡斯（Lucas Moura）回歸了，阿里（Dele Alli）解禁，對曼聯沒有人受傷，我們沒有失去任何人，還多了兩個人可用，這讓我的陣容很好了。自從我來這裡，這是第一次我擁有全部六個攻擊手。」

摩狗hurt 人真係有一手
